top_findings.summary: The skill claims "All data is local" and "No network requests, everything in ~/.claude/" in its SKILL.md file, but the runner/main.md file describes a "web" subcommand that automatically opens a browser to an external URL (https://clauding.dev/quest) with the user's progress data (including XP, unlocked achievements, and streak) encoded in the URL parameter. This transmits local user data to a third-party server without explicit consent or clear disclosure about how the data will be used, stored, or protected, contradicting the local-only claim.
